overall.description: First-person exploration of a luxurious cyberpunk apartment from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring neon-lit interiors with cyan and red accent lighting, modern minimalist furniture, and panoramic views of a futuristic cityscape at night through large windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern kitchen bar area with neon underlighting

dark cabinetry with cyan neon underlighting
cyan colored LED strip lighting under kitchen cabinets
dark bottle with red label sitting on the counter
glass with red liquid on the counter
large window showing night cityscape with building lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sleek cyberpunk kitchen bar area with cyan neon underlighting. The camera moves slowly along a wooden counter past a wine bottle, glass, and plate, with dark kitchen cabinets visible to the left and a city view window ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: living room with security glass wall and red exterior lighting

events.description: red neon light from exterior security lighting becomes prominent through the window wall

agents.ego_description: moving past the bar area toward the window wall, observing the red security lighting outside

entered.detail: tall red decorative vase on the counter
large glass wall with horizontal blinds and SECURITY text visible
red illuminated text reading SECURITY on the glass
intense red neon glow from outside illuminating the room
low-profile white sectional sofa against the wall
tall indoor plant in white planter

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past a red ceramic vase into a living area dominated by a large security glass wall bathed in red neon light from outside. The SECURITY text glows red on the window as the camera approaches, with a white modern sofa visible to the right and the kitchen area receding behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: formal dining room with city view and pendant lighting

events.description: entering the formal dining area with large table and place settings

agents.ego_description: walking around the dining table examining the formal place settings and city view through the windows

entered.detail: long rectangular wooden dining table with formal place settings
modern chairs with white upholstered backs and dark frames
rectangular suspended ceiling light with multiple panels
black plates, napkins, and cutlery arranged on the table
tall leafy plants in white planters along the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a formal dining room featuring a large wooden table with elegant place settings and modern upholstered chairs. A pendant light fixture hangs above while tall potted plants line the left wall, and the city lights are visible through large windows behind the table.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a luxurious cyberpunk residence, transitioning from a cool-toned kitchen into a red-lit lounge and finally a formal dining area. It begins by gliding along a wooden kitchen counter illuminated by cyan neon underlighting, passing a wine bottle and glass as the space opens toward a distant city view. As the camera moves past a red ceramic vase, the atmosphere shifts into a living area dominated by a large security glass wall glowing with red neon text, while a white modern sofa appears to the right. The scene then expands into a formal dining room, where the red glow gives way to the warm light of a pendant fixture hanging over a large wooden table with elegant place settings. Finally, the camera settles among upholstered chairs and tall potted plants, with the sprawling city lights visible through the expansive windows behind the table.
